channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Russia, Ukraine trade blame for continued fighting as US-brokered ceasefire nears end
item.description: Moscow and Kyiv have accused each other of disregarding U.S. President Donald Trump’s request to stop their attacks

item.title: Trump says Iran's response to peace proposal "totally unacceptable"
item.description: President Trump didn't provide details on the issues he had with the response or what would come next.

item.title: WATCH: Family of boy with rare disorder raises $500K for new playground
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to the family of Bedford Erickson, a 3-year-old boy with a rare genetic disorder, who are raising funds to build an inclusiv...

item.title: Prominent Buddhist monk arrested over alleged sex abuse
item.description: Authorities added that the victim's mother has also been arrested for aiding and abetting the monk.
